tasks.label: backend:check
tasks.command: ruff check . && ruff format --check . && mypy . && vulture . --min-confidence 80 && pytest tests/ --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing -v

tasks.label: frontend:check
tasks.command: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test -- --run

tasks.label: design:check
tasks.command: set -euo pipefail; grep -rE '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3}([0-9a-fA-F]{3})?' frontend --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.css' && { echo 'design:check failed: hex colors'; exit 1; } || true; grep -rE 'style=\{\{' frontend --include='*.tsx' && { echo 'design:check failed: inline styles'; exit 1; } || true; [ -n "$(grep -rEl "from ['\"]lucide-react['\"]" frontend/miniapp/src --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' | grep -vE 'lib/icons\.ts|design-system/icons')" ] && { echo 'design:check failed: direct lucide in miniapp (use @/lib/icons)'; exit 1; } || true; F=$(grep -rl ':root' frontend --include='*.css' 2>/dev/null | grep -v -E 'tokens/tokens\.css|miniapp-tokens\.css' | head -1); if [ -n "$F" ]; then echo "design:check failed: :root outside token files: $F"; exit 1; fi

tasks.label: openapi:sync
tasks.command: (cd backend && python3 scripts/export_openapi.py) && git diff --exit-code openapi/openapi.json

tasks.label: migrate:safe
tasks.command: python -m alembic upgrade head && python -m alembic check

tasks.label: full:check
tasks.command: cd backend && (ruff check . && ruff format --check . && mypy . && vulture . --min-confidence 80 && pytest tests/ --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing -v) && cd ../frontend && (npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test -- --run) && cd .. && (set -euo pipefail; grep -rE '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3}([0-9a-fA-F]{3})?' frontend --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.css' && { echo 'design:check failed: hex'; exit 1; } || true; grep -rE 'style=\{\{' frontend --include='*.tsx' && { echo 'design:check failed: inline styles'; exit 1; } || true; [ -n "$(grep -rEl "from ['\"]lucide-react['\"]" frontend/miniapp/src --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' | grep -vE 'lib/icons\.ts|design-system/icons')" ] && { echo 'design:check failed: lucide'; exit 1; } || true; F=$(grep -rl ':root' frontend --include='*.css' 2>/dev/null | grep -v -E 'tokens/tokens\.css|miniapp-tokens\.css' | head -1); if [ -n "$F" ]; then echo "design:check failed: :root in $F"; exit 1; fi) && (cd backend && python3 scripts/export_openapi.py) && git diff --exit-code openapi/openapi.json && cd backend && (python -m alembic upgrade head && python -m alembic check)
